release.action:
Features

  • Provide the assembly Maven goal (Assembly Maven Plugin) with configurable defaults.

Documentation

  • Publish initial project site structure and documentation updates (site.xml, index.md, generated docs).
  • Add and refine Javadoc and package documentation (overview, package-info.java).

Chores

  • Set and update project versions leading up to the 1.0.0 release.
  • Update build/site resources (icons, links, manifests) and generated outputs.

Fixes

  • Apply Sonar-related fixes and code quality corrections.

Tests

  • Add additional automated tests.
